summary_one_line: ICC profile with XYZ-data PCS device-class (spac/prtr) input plus Lab output PCS, driving the XYZ->Lab conversion arm

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A 4-byte device-class / profile-class signature at offset 0x0c that the parser maps to XYZ-data PCS (winner seeds carry 'spac'=73 70 61 63 or 'prtr'=70 72 74 72), combined with the Lab output PCS selection, so InPCS==cmsSigXYZData and OutPCS==cmsSigLabData reach line 443.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds set offset 0x0c-0x0f to 'spac'/'prtr' (W bytes 70(p)/73(s) at 0x0c) and additionally flip the discriminator bytes at 0x2d (W=01) and 0x3d (W=50 'P'), which the loser never produces; these literal four-byte FOURCC class tags are exactly what I2SRandReplace can splice from a logged CMP operand.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile seeds are stuck at offset 0x0c='mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) for all 20 occurrences and keep 0x2d=00, 0x3d=00, so the parser routes to a PCS path that never enters the XYZ->Lab arm at line 443.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer where the parser compared the input class tag against the literal 'spac'/'prtr' FOURCC constants and substitutes that constant into the input bytes; value_profile has no I2SRandReplace and cannot place the exact multi-byte tag, so value_profile_cmplog beats value_profile on the I2S axis.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Same XYZ-PCS-in / Lab-PCS-out structural requirement, but reached via incremental gradient progress on the multi-field colorspace comparison rather than a single substitution; the input must simultaneously satisfy the class tag and the colorspace fields (0x10-0x16) selecting Lab output.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 with hitcount 19 on the branch, getting CMP_MAP gradient credit for each colorspace/PCS sub-field that moves closer to the XYZ->Lab discriminant, layered on top of I2S substitution.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog (no value profile) resolves only 2/10 with avg hitcount 1, so without the Hamming/prefix-distance feedback it rarely accumulates the multi-field colorspace state needed to enter the XYZ->Lab arm.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient preserves intermediate inputs that get closer on the colorspace/PCS comparisons, giving the fuzzer a smooth path to the XYZ->Lab discriminant; cmplog lacks this distance feedback, so value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog on the value_profile axis.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the XYZ->Lab conversion arm, requiring XYZ input PCS and Lab output PCS.
The blocked side is the true branch of the line-443 InsertStage check.
Winner seeds carry 'spac' or 'prtr' class tags at offset 0x0c while losers are stuck on 'mntr'.
Winner seeds set discriminator byte 0x3d to 'P' while losers keep it zero.
Winner seeds set byte 0x2d to 01 while losers keep it 00.
value_profile_cmplog beats value_profile on the I2S axis with prob_div 0.90.
I2SRandReplace scans the input for byte sequences matching one operand and substitutes the other operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog beats cmplog on the value_profile axis with prob_div 0.70.
cmplog resolves only 2/10 with avg hitcount 1 on this branch.
value_profile's CMP_MAP preserves inputs whose operand pair is closer to matching than any previously-seen pair.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog resolves 9/10 with avg hitcount 19 on the branch.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2087 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 9e27a4d33b2ce2e2` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 13 of the 14-level ancestor chain, the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc under the current build

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the XYZ->Lab arm on a 4-byte literal class tag at a fixed offset where cmplog/vpc fail to resolve at higher rate than value_profile, showing I2S substitution does not place the tag.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact semantic role of bytes 0x2d and 0x3d (W=01, W='P') is inferred as PCS/class discriminators from the byte diff but not confirmed against the lcms profile-header parse path.
